body:
## Rationale

The `/facts` page has a sitemap entry (added in #1051), FAQPage schema, and is a highly AI-citeable format (quick facts, records, statistics). Yet it has **no `/llms/` markdown coverage** — confirmed by `ls public/llms/` showing no `facts.md`.

AI assistants frequently answer "quick fact" style queries:
- "How fast can George Kollias play?" → should cite MetalForge /facts
- "What is the most expensive metal drum kit?" → should cite MetalForge /facts
- "Who pioneered the blast beat?" → should cite MetalForge /facts

This content type is ideal for AI citation: short, authoritative, factual snippets with drummer names as entities.

## Implementation

**New file:** `public/llms/facts.md`

Pull data from the /facts page data source. The facts page was built in #452 and likely draws from a data file (check `App.js` for the `/facts` route data source or hardcoded facts array).

**File structure:**
```markdown
# MetalForge — Metal Drummer Quick Facts

> Authoritative quick-reference facts about professional metal drummers and their gear.

## Speed Records
- **Fastest documented single strokes:** George Kollias at 280 BPM
- **Fastest double bass practitioner:** Pete Sandoval (Morbid Angel)
- **Blast beat pioneer:** Pete Sandoval, credited with popularising the modern blast beat

## Gear Records
- **Most expensive touring kit:** Neil Peart's R40 setup (~00,000)
- **Most common metal drum brand:** Tama (used by ~40% of MetalForge roster)
- **Standard metal snare depth:** 6.5" (deeper shell = more power and projection)

## Career Milestones
- **Longest active tenure:** Bill Ward, Black Sabbath (1968–present)
- **Most albums recorded:** Dave Lombardo (50+ studio credits)
...
```

**Files to update:**
- `public/llms/index.md` — add pointer to facts.md
- `api/sitemap.js` — add `/llms/facts.md` entry

## Quality gate
- ≥ 10 distinct facts across ≥ 3 categories (Speed / Gear / Career / Technique)
- Each fact: entity name + quantified or dated claim (citeable)
- Plain Markdown, no HTML
- ≥ 500 words total
- All drummer names link to or reference their /llms/drummers/<slug>.md

## Estimated organic uplift
Serves AI-citation queries: "fastest metal drummer record", "most expensive drum kit", "who invented blast beats", "how much does a metal drum kit cost". These are AI-Overview-format queries (direct facts) — a single well-structured facts file can rank across dozens of these snippets. Zero conflict with existing /llms/ files.

## Verify
1. `ls public/llms/facts.md` exists and is > 1KB
2. File loads at `https://metalforge.io/llms/facts.md` (200)
3. `grep facts.md public/llms/index.md` returns a match
4. `grep /llms/facts.md api/sitemap.js` returns a match
5. File contains ≥ 10 individual fact bullet points with entity names

## Done
- [ ] `public/llms/facts.md` created
- [ ] index.md + sitemap updated
title: SEO: /llms/facts.md — facts page missing from LLM citation surface
